name: 1'4"x2'4" Proud Plant Parent Rectangle Outdoor Door Mat Black - Room Essentials™
description:
Welcome your guests to your gorgeous abode in style with this 'Proud Plant Parent' Rectangle Outdoor Doormat from Room Essentials™. The rectangular outdoor doormat features the phrase ''Proud Plant Parent'' and potted plants graphic in a black hue for an inviting look. Made with 100% coir and a latex back, this medium-pile doormat helps capture dirt and debris at your doorstep and is easy to shake clean when needed.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
